ddls:
CREATE TABLE "data_mappings" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping task */,
  "src_index" INTEGER /* Index of the source data */,
  "tgt_index" INTEGER /* Index of the target data */,
  "src_size" INTEGER /* Size of the source data */,
  "tgt_size" INTEGER /* Size of the target data */,
  "max_dist" INTEGER /* Maximum distance between source and target data */,
  "result" INTEGER /* Transformation result */,
  "norm_dist" REAL /* Normalized distance between source and target */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the mapping task was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the mapping task */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created or last updated the mapping task */,
  "source_format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the format of the source data */,
  "target_format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the format of the target data */,
  "batch_size" INTEGER /* Size of the batch for batch processing */,
  "timeout" INTEGER /* Timeout duration for the mapping task */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_mappings_source_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_format_id") REFERENCES data_formats ("format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_mappings_target_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_format_id") REFERENCES data_formats ("format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_mappings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., Database, API) */,
  "connection_info" TEXT /* Connection information for the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data source was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the data source */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created or last updated the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sources_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_targets" (
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data target */,
  "target_name" TEXT /* Name of the data target */,
  "target_type" TEXT /* Type of the data target (e.g., Database, File) */,
  "connection_info" TEXT /* Connection information for the data target */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data target was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the data target */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created or last updated the data target */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data target */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_targets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transformation_rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transformation rule */,
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated mapping task */,
  "rule_description" TEXT /* Description of the transformation rule */,
  "transformation_type" TEXT /* Type of transformation (e.g., Aggregation, Filtering) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the rule was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the rule */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created or last updated the rule */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the rule is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transformation_rules_mapping_id FOREIGN KEY ("mapping_id") REFERENCES data_mappings ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transformation_rules_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mapping_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated mapping task */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the mapping execution */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the mapping (e.g., Success, Failure) */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if the mapping failed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the mapping */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the mapping task in seconds */,
  "source_format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the format of the source data */,
  "target_format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the format of the target data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mapping_logs_mapping_id FOREIGN KEY ("mapping_id") REFERENCES data_mappings ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mapping_logs_source_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_format_id") REFERENCES data_formats ("format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mapping_logs_target_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_format_id") REFERENCES data_formats ("format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mapping_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data engineer, analyst) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mapping_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated mapping task */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the parameter was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the parameter */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created or last updated the parameter */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the parameter is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mapping_parameters_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mapping_parameters_mapping_id FOREIGN KEY ("mapping_id") REFERENCES data_mappings ("mapping_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mapping_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated mapping task */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the mapping */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the version */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created or last updated the version */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the version is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mapping_versions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mapping_versions_mapping_id FOREIGN KEY ("mapping_id") REFERENCES data_mappings ("mapping_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mapping_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status entry */,
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated mapping task */,
  "current_status" TEXT /* Current status of the mapping task */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last status update */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the status */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the current status in seconds */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the status is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mapping_status_mapping_id FOREIGN KEY ("mapping_id") REFERENCES data_mappings ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mapping_status_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_checks" (
  "check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality check */,
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated mapping task */,
  "check_description" TEXT /* Description of the quality check */,
  "is_passed" INTEGER /* Result of the check (true if passed, false if failed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the check was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the check */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created or last updated the check */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the check is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_checks_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_checks_mapping_id FOREIGN KEY ("mapping_id") REFERENCES data_mappings ("mapping_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the data format (e.g., JSON, XML) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data format */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the format was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the format */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created or last updated the format */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the format is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_formats_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mapping_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated mapping task */,
  "event_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who triggered the event */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mapping_events_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mapping_events_mapping_id FOREIGN KEY ("mapping_id") REFERENCES data_mappings ("mapping_id")
)
